intro: The Windows threat landscape in this period was dominated by activity from Kyber and Chaotic Eclipse. Their campaigns frequently exploited several critical vulnerabilities, most notably CVE-2026-33104, CVE-2026-26179, and CVE-2026-32183. Older CVEs, including CVE-2024-20662 and CVE-2024-21412, also remained in active use. Across the 21 articles analyzed, the severity of reported incidents was significant, with the majority classified as high-severity events. This concentrated activity underscores the persistent targeting of Windows environments by distinct threat groups leveraging both newly disclosed and established security flaws.
